repository_head_before_artifact.expected_main_subject: lean: add SIDFH gravity proof conditional surface (#848)

external_context.relevance: Reports a proposed topological explanation of the cosmological constant from quantum gravitational theta vacua / gravitational Hall effect.
external_context.boundary_use: Supports a cosmological-constant/topological-protection research direction, but does not prove SIDFH gravity recovery.

external_context.relevance: States that black-hole mass density, entropy, and interior non-singularity lack a fully coherent understanding and proposes a spacetime-condensate interpretation.

external_context.relevance: Public-facing summary that gravity remains unresolved at a foundational level.

external_context.relevance: Reports ongoing difficulty measuring the gravitational constant G and disagreement among recent measurements.

next_bounded_target.name: Omega00WeakFieldAsymptotic
